name: Klaviyo

composio_registry_match.name: Klaviyo
composio_registry_match.description: Klaviyo is a data-driven email and SMS marketing platform that allows e-commerce brands to deliver targeted messages, track conversions, and scale customer relationships

description: Klaviyo is a marketing automation platform specializing in email and SMS marketing, offering deep customer data segmentation and personalized automation flows.
notes: Authentication is primarily handled via Private API Keys generated in the Klaviyo dashboard; the platform has a mature and extensive REST API surface documented for broad developer use.
